Notice Of Motion And Motion To Change Venue To Orange County (Ccp 395(A) And Request For Sanctions In The Amount Of $1990 Against Pltf And Her Attorney, Elizabeth Karnazes, Esq., Purusantto C.C.P 396(B); Request For Judicial Notice In Support Of Motion To Change Venue To Orange
Off Calendar Feb-08-2010 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANTS LAWRENCE MOY, and, LAW OFFICES OF LAWRENCE A. MOY, Motion To Change Venue from the San Francisco Superior Court, To Orange County Superior Court, State of California (CCP 395(A) and Request For Sanctions in the Amount Of $1990 against Plaintiff and Her Attorney, Elizabeth Karnazes, Esq., Pursuant to C.C.P 396(B). Appearances: Nil Reese, Plaintiff in Pro Per appearing and opposing party; John N. Dahlberg, Esq. Dillingham & Murphy LLP (415) 397-2700 appearing for Defendant and moving party. Argued (as to the change of venue portion of the tentative ruling, the only contested portion) and the Court adopted and amended its tentative ruling as follows: Motion granted in part and denied in part. Change of venue motion granted, matter transferred to Orange County. Request for sanctions denied. (The Court adds: supplemental Declaration untimely.) Order signed in open Court.(302/CWW)Judge: Charlotte Walter Woolard; Court Reporter: Kent Gubbine CSR # 5797
